use_cases: Interactive calendar for selecting dates in appointment booking systems
Monthly date navigation with today indicator and selection highlighting
Scheduling interface for SaaS platforms with glass morphism aesthetic
Date picker component for healthcare appointment management systems
ai_summary: A glass morphism calendar component featuring month navigation, date selection with today highlighting, and smooth transitions. Built with Framer Motion for animations and date-fns for date handling. The component displays a full month grid with interactive day cells that support click-to-select functionality, making it ideal for booking interfaces and scheduling applications in SaaS, healthcare, or educational platforms.
